creator: pfgiffun@bachue.usc.unal.edu.co
text:
Using i386-coff limits the functionality of the port, but the update
can't be built with i386-sco due to problems with our version of GNU as.
The update is also required when we update the tools for an ELF
environment. I suggest the new port (now in incoming) is committed after
2.2.6-R is out: It will build with both versions of the bintools, but
lacks some of the support of the older version.
When 3.0-R is out an even newer update can be done.
